notes: MinerU Markdown equations are usable for a first-pass derivation, but several OCR artifacts remain in inflation, markup, and Appendix A notation.
The entry normalizes equations to consistent notation without targeted PDF-body inspection.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

implementation_cross_check.summary: Rep-MMB implementation confirms linearized variables, capital timing through lags, premium variable S, flexible-price counterpart for ypot, and shocks ub/ul/ux/ua/ur/ug/uw/ulambdapi.
